chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1089 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A No.4580/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 22.08.2025. Mr. Ahmed Murtaza A.Arab, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Nasrullah Khaskheli, Advocate for Respondents/HESCO. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, A.A.G. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Learned Counsel for Petitioners contended that he will be satisfied if all the pending applications pending before the Authority i.e. HESCO would be decided regarding fixing of meter. Learned A.A.G & Mr. Khaskheli present on behalf of HESCO agreed and submitted that the Applications of Petitioners pending before Authority will be decided within 15 days. In view of above proposition, the Petition in hand is hereby disposed of with directions to decide the pending applications of Petitioners pending before Authority. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
